title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.150 - Judgment by default shall be rendered, when — proof of title to be exhibited
text:
528.150.  Judgment by default shall be rendered, when — proof of title to be exhibited. — If any of the parties, duly notified according to law, shall not appear and answer within the time allowed for that purpose, the default shall be entered, but the petitioners shall, nevertheless, exhibit proofs of their title.
(RSMo 1939 § 1723) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1559; 1919 § 2007; 1909 § 2571
